title: OpenAI sidesteps Nvidia with unusually fast coding model on plate-sized chips

description: Infernos raged aboard Japanese aircraft carriers after U.S. Navy dive-bombers found their marks during the Battle of Midway. title: Atomically Thin Materials Significantly Shrink Qubits
description: Quantum computing is a devilishly complex technology, with many technical hurdles impacting its development.
